category_sources: Official Jmxterm docs describe it as a command-line alternative to jconsole for accessing Java MBean servers.
source_facts.description says it is an open source command-line interactive JMX client.
display_name_sources: Official documentation page heading uses Jmxterm.
docs_sources: Official CyclopsGroup Jmxterm docs navigation lists Introduction, Features, User manual, Scripting, and F.A.Q.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official docs say Jmxterm accesses Java MBean servers from a command-line console.
source_facts.description identifies a command-line JMX client.
